thai: ตามใจนะ
definition: Up to you. / As you wish. / All right (as you wish). / Suit yourself.

definition: Leave (him) alone! / Stay away from (him)! / Don’t touch (that)!

thai: มันเป็นของปลอม
definition: It’s fake. / This is a fake.

thai: ผมจะฟ้องคุณ
definition: I’ll sue you! / I’m gonna sue you!

thai: ผม(จะ)ยกให้
definition: I’ll give it to you. / I’ll give you it. (implication: and you keep it)

ไม่สะดวก
definition: It’s inconvenient. / It’s not a good time. / It’s difficult (because one isn’t free, etc.)

definition: I knew it! / I thought so! / Just as I thought!

definition: (I) can’t tell yet. / (I) don’t know yet.
